check: Canonical and hreflang use production domain (no placeholders)
acceptance_test: Canonical and hreflang resolved to final domain for all target slugs

check: robots.txt and sitemap are valid, crawlable, and linked
acceptance_test: Robots parses correctly and sitemap is reachable/referenced

check: Unique title and meta description per post
acceptance_test: No missing or duplicated metadata in target batch

check: Sequential heading order, descriptive anchors, AA contrast
acceptance_test: No heading-order or critical contrast/link-text failures

check: Relevant non-empty alt text and valid image aspect ratios
acceptance_test: No aspect-ratio failures and descriptive alt policy met
Required schema present and valid for all target posts

check: AI-assisted changes require human editorial review before publish
acceptance_test: Each AI-assisted post includes reviewer sign-off and trust/source checks

check: CWV p75 targets met where measurable (LCP<=2.5, INP<=200, CLS<=0.1)
acceptance_test: CWV target met or accepted exception documented
